Cultural.rationale: Strong emphasis on British cultural identity, controlled immigration, and sovereignty over multicultural integration. To be documented.

Military.rationale: Mixed interventionism; strong on national defence but sceptical of EU defence integration. To be documented.

Sovereignty.rationale: Absolute priority on restoring full parliamentary sovereignty and ending ECJ jurisdiction. To be documented.

Economic.rationale: Preference for protectionist trade policy and economic nationalism over EU single-market membership. To be documented.

Class.rationale: Cross-class coalition with varied positions on workers' rights and regulation. To be documented.

Governance.rationale: Mixed; emphasis on national self-determination but some acceptance of state authority. To be documented.
